channel_subscription_required: To use the bot, join the channel and tap "Check subscription".
channel_subscription_check_failed: Couldn't verify the subscription. Please try again later or contact support.
channel_subscription_verified_success: ✅ Subscription confirmed! You're good to go.
webapp_auth_success: ✅ Login confirmed. Return to the Web App.
webapp_auth_expired: The login link has expired. Return to the Web App and try again.
telegram_notifications_started: ✅ Notifications are enabled. The bot can now send important messages.
main_menu_greeting:
Hi, {user_name}! 👋
Open "Personal Account" to set up the connection, view your subscription, or renew access.
no_subscription_options_available: Subscription issuance is not configured by the bot administrator
referral_no_bonuses_configured: Sorry, the referral program is currently disabled
bot_interface_menu_webapp_hint: The Personal Account is the easier place to manage the service.
error_occurred_try_again: An error occurred, please try again.
choose_payment_method_traffic: Choose how to pay for the traffic package:
yookassa_autopay_flow_prompt: Auto-renew is enabled. Choose how you'd like to pay:
yookassa_autopay_choose_saved_card: Choose a saved card to charge:
yookassa_autopay_no_saved_cards: No saved cards found. Pay with a new card or link one in Payment Methods.
yookassa_autopay_charge_initiated: Charge request sent to the selected card. We'll notify you once the payment completes.
my_devices_details:
📱 My Devices ({current_devices}/{max_devices}) {devices} You can disconnect a device by selecting it from the list below.
Note: If you disconnect a device, it will be automatically connected again when you use it next. Before deleting, make sure you have deleted the subscription from the application.
no_devices_details_found_message: 📱 My Devices You don't have any devices yet. You have {max_devices} devices available. You can connect them by clicking the "🔗 Connect" button in the subscription menu.
my_devices_feature_disabled: The My Devices section is currently unavailable.
payment_link_message: To pay for {months} mo. subscription, click the button below:
payment_link_message_traffic: To pay for a {traffic_gb} GB package, tap the button below:
payment_invoice_sent_message: Telegram has sent the invoice above. Complete the payment or pick another method below.
payment_invoice_sent_message_traffic: Invoice for {traffic_gb} GB sent above. Complete the payment or pick another method below.
payment_successful_error_details: ✅ Payment succeeded, but an error occurred displaying details. Your subscription is active. Contact support if anything is wrong.
payment_successful_full:
✅ Payment successful!
Your {months}-month subscription is active until {end_date}.
payment_successful_hwid_devices_full:
✅ Payment successful!
Extra HWID devices added: +{count}.
payment_successful_with_referral_bonus_f:
✅ Payment successful!
Your {months}-month subscription (base end date: {base_end_date}) has been extended by {bonus_days} bonus days for referral from {inviter_name} and is now active until {final_end_date}.
payment_failed: ❌ Payment failed or was cancelled. Please try again or contact support.
promo_code_not_found: Promo code {code} not found, expired, or already used the maximum number of times.
promo_code_too_many_attempts: Too many failed promo code attempts. Please try again in {seconds} sec.
promo_code_already_used_by_user: You have already used promo code {code}.
promo_code_applied_success_full: ✅ Promo code applied successfully! Subscription active until {end_date}. Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
error_applying_promo_bonus: Failed to apply promo bonus. Please try again later or contact support.
trial_already_had_subscription_or_trial: You have already used a free trial or had a paid subscription. Free trial is available only once for new users.
trial_activated_details_message: ✅ Trial activated! Your {days}-day trial is active until {end_date}. Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
referral_welcome_bonus_applied:
🎁 You have received {days} bonus day(s) for registering via a referral link!
Your subscription is active until {end_date}.
referral_program_info_new: 🎁 Referral Program 📊 Your stats: 👥 Friends invited: {invited_count} 💳 Purchased subscription: {purchased_count} 🔗 Telegram link: {referral_link}{webapp_link_section} 💰 Invitation bonuses: {bonus_details} 📢 Share the link with friends and get bonuses!
referral_bonus_per_period: 🎁 For a friend's {months}-month subscription: ➢ You: {inviter_bonus_days} days ➢ Friend: {referee_bonus_days} days
referral_not_available_for_traffic: Referral bonuses are not available for traffic packages.
referral_bonus_inviter_notification_exte: 🎉 Congrats! Your friend {referee_name} paid for a subscription. You received {days} bonus days! Your subscription is now active until {new_end_date}.
referral_bonus_inviter_notification_new_: 🎉 Congrats! Your friend {referee_name} paid for a subscription. You received a {days}-day bonus subscription! It is active until {new_end_date}.
user_is_banned: 🚫 Your account is banned. Please contact support.
admin_broadcast_confirm_prompt_short: The message above will be sent. Confirm?
admin_broadcast_cancelled_nav_back: Broadcast cancelled. You are returned to the admin panel.
broadcast_queue_result:
🚀 Broadcast queued!
📤 Enqueued: {sent_count}
❌ Errors: {failed_count}

📊 Queue Status:
👥 User queue: {user_queue_size} messages
📢 Group queue: {group_queue_size} messages

ℹ️ Messages will be sent automatically within Telegram limits.

admin_promo_invalid_max_activations: Max activations must be a positive number.
admin_promo_invalid_validity_days: Validity period (in days) must be a positive number.
admin_promo_created_success: ✅ Promo code {code} created successfully! Bonus: {bonus_days} days Max uses: {max_activations} Valid until: {valid_until_str}.
admin_promo_export_all_caption:
📄 Export of all promo codes
📊 Total: {count} promo codes

admin_promo_prompt_max_activations: Enter the new maximum number of activations:
admin_promo_prompt_validity_days: Enter the new validity period in days (0 for indefinite):

admin_unban_user_prompt: Enter user ID, @username, or email to unban:
admin_prompt_for_user_id_or_username_log: Enter user ID, @username, or email to view logs:

admin_broadcast_invalid_html: ❌ Invalid HTML in message. Please send valid HTML (Telegram-supported tags) or remove tags.
error_displaying_logs_too_long: Error: logs too long to display in one message. Try viewing logs for a specific user.
subscription_72h_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in 3 days — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_48h_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in 2 days — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_24h_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in 1 day — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_hours_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in {hours} hours — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_expired_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⛔ Your service subscription expired on {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_expired_yesterday_notificat:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expired yesterday ({end_date}).

Please renew it using the button below.
autorenew_48h_charge_tomorrow_notice:
🔔 Reminder

Tomorrow an automatic charge will occur to renew your subscription. If you don't want auto-renew, disable it using the button below.
autorenew_confirm_enable: 🔄 Enable auto-renew? An automatic charge will be attempted before your subscription ends.
autorenew_confirm_disable: 🛑 Disable auto-renew? No further automatic charges will occur.
admin_user_management_prompt:
👤 User Management

Enter user ID, @username, or email to search:
admin_premium_override_hint: Grant free extra premium traffic or unlimited premium access for this user.
admin_premium_override_bonus_prompt: Enter additional premium GB for user {user_id} (number, decimals allowed):
admin_premium_override_invalid_gb: ❌ Invalid value. Enter a non-negative number of GB.
admin_premium_override_state_missing: ⚠️ Target user missing in state. Open the user card again.
admin_hwid_limit_hint: Set a manual base device limit for this user. 0 means unlimited; reset returns to the tariff or default limit.
admin_hwid_limit_prompt: Enter the HWID device limit for user {user_id}. 0 means unlimited:

admin_hwid_limit_state_missing: ⚠️ Target user missing in state. Open the user card again.
admin_hwid_limit_save_error: ❌ Failed to save HWID device limit
admin_traffic_grant_hint: Credit GB to the user's balance — same effect as a top-up purchase, but without payment. The panel limit and squads refresh immediately.
admin_traffic_grant_prompt_regular: Enter the amount of regular traffic in GB for user {user_id} (number, decimals allowed):
admin_traffic_grant_prompt_premium: Enter the amount of premium traffic in GB for user {user_id} (number, decimals allowed):

admin_traffic_grant_no_user: ⚠️ No target user selected. Open the user card again.

admin_traffic_grant_regular_done: ✅ +{gb} GB of regular traffic granted to user {user_id}
admin_traffic_grant_premium_done: ✅ +{gb} GB of premium traffic granted to user {user_id}
admin_user_delete_not_allowed: ❌ You are not permitted to delete users.
admin_user_delete_confirmation_prompt:
⚠️ You are about to delete user {user_id} from the bot and the panel.

Send the exact Telegram ID of this user to confirm.
Any other reply will cancel the operation.

admin_user_delete_panel_error: ❌ Failed to remove the user from the panel. Operation aborted.
admin_user_delete_success: ✅ User {user_id} was removed from the bot and the panel.
admin_user_delete_error: ❌ Unable to delete the user. Please try again later.

admin_user_invalid_days: ❌ Invalid number of days. Enter number from 1 to 3650.

✉️ Sending message to user {user_id}

Enter message text:
inline_user_stats_message: 👥 User Statistics 📊 Total: {total} 📈 Active today: {active_today} 📡 With active subscription: {active} 💳 With paid subscription: {paid} 🧪 With trial subscription: {trial} 🎁 With free subscription: {free} 😴 Without active subscription: {inactive} 🚫 Banned: {banned} 🎁 Via referral program: {referral}
inline_financial_stats_message: 💰 Financial Statistics 📅 Today: {today:.2f} RUB ({today_count} payments) 📅 Week: {week:.2f} RUB 📅 Month: {month:.2f} RUB 🏆 All time: {all_time:.2f} RUB
inline_system_stats_message: 🖥 Panel Statistics 🟢 Online: {online} 📊 Active: {active} 🔴 Disabled: {disabled} ⏰ Expired: {expired} ⚠️ Limited: {limited} 👥 Total users: {total} 💾 RAM Usage: {memory:.1f}% 📊 Week traffic: {week_traffic} 📊 Month traffic: {month_traffic} 🔗 Active nodes: {active_nodes}/{total_nodes}
log_account_merged: 🔗 Accounts merged 🆔 Kept user ID: {primary_user_id} 🗑 Removed user ID: {removed_user_id} 📨 Telegram ID: {telegram_id} 👤 User: {user_display} 📧 Email: {email} ⏰ New end date: {final_end_date} 📋 Kept panel UUID: {primary_panel_user_uuid} 📋 Removed panel UUID: {removed_panel_user_uuid} 🕐 Time: {timestamp}
traffic_warning_regular_almost: ⚠️ Traffic for plan {tariff_name} is almost used up. About {left_pct}% remains. Current period: used — {used} available — {remaining} limit — {limit_total} Use the button below to buy more regular traffic in the mini app.
traffic_warning_regular_depleted: ⛔️ Traffic for plan {tariff_name} is depleted. Current period: used — {used} available — {remaining} limit — {limit_total} Access may be limited until the period resets or you top up. Use the button below to buy traffic.
traffic_warning_premium_almost: ⚠️ The premium server quota for plan {tariff_name} is almost used up. About {left_pct}% remains. Current period: used — {used} available — {remaining} limit — {limit_total} This limit applies to: {servers} Use the button below to buy premium traffic in the mini app; unused purchased balance carries over to later months.
traffic_warning_premium_depleted: ⛔️ The premium server quota for plan {tariff_name} is used up. Current period: used — {used} available — {remaining} limit — {limit_total} This limit applies to: {servers} Access may be limited until the period resets or you buy more premium traffic. Use the button below to top up.
traffic_warning_premium_generic_servers: • servers with premium access under your plan

email_footer_auto: Sent automatically by {brand}. Please don't reply.
email_login_code_preheader: Your one-time code expires in {minutes} min.
email_login_code_intro: Use this 6-digit code to finish signing in to your subscription dashboard.
email_login_code_expiry_html: The code is valid for {minutes} min.
email_login_code_security: If you didn't request this code, you can ignore this email — your account stays safe.
email_login_code_magic_intro: Don't want to type the code? Sign in with this link.
email_login_code_magic_hint: The link is single-use and expires together with the code.

email_set_password_code_expiry_html: The password creation code is valid for {minutes} min.
email_set_password_code_security: If you didn't try to create a password, ignore this email — your account password will not change.
email_account_merged_preheader: Your accounts were combined into one profile.
email_account_merged_intro: We merged your accounts into a single profile so you keep one subscription and one history of payments.
email_account_merged_note: Your subscription link is unchanged. The duplicate panel user was removed automatically.
email_payment_success_preheader: Thanks — your subscription has been activated.

email_payment_success_footer_note: We'll remind you a few days before the subscription ends.

admin_health_data_dir_missing: Data directory ({path}) not found. Make sure the data volume is mounted into the container.
admin_health_data_dir_not_writable: No write access to {path} — backups, tariffs, logos and translations cannot be saved.
admin_health_subscription_page_config_in: Subscription guides config cannot be read: {error}
admin_health_provider_not_configured: Provider {provider} is enabled but not configured — payments through it will not work.
admin_health_provider_webhook_needs_base: Provider {provider} requires WEBHOOK_BASE_URL for webhooks, but it is not set.
admin_health_mini_app_url_missing: SUBSCRIPTION_MINI_APP_URL is not set — the Mini App button will not appear in the bot.
admin_health_redis_not_configured: REDIS_URL is not set — bot dialog states and caches will not survive a restart.
admin_health_smtp_incomplete: SMTP is partially configured — email login will not work.
admin_health_proxy_not_trusted: Requests arrive through proxy {remote} which is not in TRUSTED_PROXIES — payment provider webhooks may be rejected by IP.
admin_health_bot_token_invalid: Telegram rejected BOT_TOKEN — the bot is not working.
admin_health_telegram_api_error: Failed to reach the Telegram API: {error}
admin_health_telegram_webhook_missing: Telegram webhook is not set — the bot does not receive updates.
admin_health_telegram_webhook_error: Telegram reports a webhook delivery error: {error}
admin_health_telegram_webhook_pending: {count} unprocessed updates are queued in Telegram.
admin_health_panel_api_not_configured: PANEL_API_URL and PANEL_API_KEY are not set — sync and subscription provisioning do not work.
admin_backups_pre_restore_snapshot: Current compose folder was saved before replacement: {path}
admin_users_filters_description: Refine the user list without leaving the table.
admin_settings_field_smtp_enabled_descri: Enable SMTP email delivery for verification codes, password resets, and notifications.
admin_settings_field_smtp_host_descripti: SMTP server hostname or IP address.
admin_settings_field_smtp_port_descripti: SMTP server port (465 for TLS/SSL, 587 for STARTTLS, 25 for plain).
admin_settings_field_smtp_username_descr: SMTP authentication username. Leave empty if no authentication.
admin_settings_field_smtp_from_email_des: Sender email address for outgoing messages.
admin_settings_field_smtp_from_name_desc: Sender display name (e.g., your brand name).
admin_settings_field_brand_name_descript: Brand name used in email subjects and footers.
admin_settings_field_email_template_veri: Markdown template for email verification codes. Variables: {{.Brand}}, {{.Code}}, {{.ExpireMinutes}}. Leave empty for default.
admin_settings_field_email_template_pass: Markdown template for password reset codes. Variables: {{.Brand}}, {{.Code}}, {{.ExpireMinutes}}.
admin_settings_field_email_template_logi: Markdown template for login verification codes. Variables: {{.Brand}}, {{.Code}}, {{.ExpireMinutes}}.
admin_settings_field_telemetry_enabled_d: Sends one anonymous heartbeat per day (version, official/custom image marker, OS, locale, user-count range). No personal data, tokens or domains. Helps gauge active installs, versions in use and the share of modified builds. Toggling this off takes effect without a restart.
admin_settings_field_telegram_drop_non_p: Drops group and channel messages/callbacks before database-backed middleware runs. Keep enabled for a private sales bot.
admin_settings_field_telegram_antiflood_: Enables soft per-user limits that cut off only extreme Telegram update floods.
Rolling window in seconds used by all Telegram anti-flood buckets.
Maximum total Telegram updates from one user or chat during the window. 0 disables this bucket.
Maximum message updates from one user or chat during the window. 0 disables this bucket.
Maximum callback-query updates from one user during the window. 0 disables this bucket.
Maximum inline-query updates from one user during the window. 0 disables this bucket.
Maximum /start messages from one user during the window. 0 disables this bucket.
Maximum payment, trial, promo and account-changing callbacks from one user during the window. 0 disables this bucket.
admin_settings_field_telegram_action_coo: Deduplicates exact repeated payment and trial button presses from the same user.
admin_settings_field_telegram_payment_ca: Seconds to suppress an exact repeated payment callback from the same user. 0 disables this cooldown.
admin_settings_field_telegram_trial_call: Seconds to suppress an exact repeated trial activation callback from the same user. 0 disables this cooldown.
admin_settings_provider_webhook_url_hint: Use this URL in the provider webhook settings.
admin_settings_panel_webhook_url_hint: Use this URL as WEBHOOK_URL in Remnawave Panel.
admin_settings_provider_webhook_base_mis: Set WEBHOOK_BASE_URL in .env to show the full URL for {path}.
admin_settings_provider_admin_only_descr: Shows this provider only to admins. Webhooks and payment status handling remain active for test payments.
admin_settings_field_migration_remnashop: Allows old Remnashop referral codes to resolve without changing their case or format. The importer enables it automatically.
Looks up promo codes in the original case first, then falls back to the current rules. Regular promo codes keep working as before.
Operational marker for the latest Remnashop import, stored as an ISO timestamp.
Short importer summary: migrated entities and enabled compatibility modes.
admin_stats_revenue_chart_aria: Daily revenue chart; hover for date and amount
admin_stats_revenue_chart_hint: Hover the chart to see each day’s total
admin_stats_revenue_chart_hint_week: Weeks start on Monday (UTC); hover the chart for totals
admin_stats_revenue_chart_hint_month: Months are calendar months (UTC); hover the chart for totals
admin_stats_card_active_subs_caption: Paid, trial, and free access combined
admin_stats_card_paid_caption: Paid users separated from trial and free access
admin_stats_card_inactive_caption: Share of all users is in the badge
admin_stats_panel_unavailable_detail: Check REMNAWAVE_* settings and panel API reachability.
admin_stats_panel_nodes_online_hint: Same as the number of rows in the per-node section below (7-day window from bandwidth or node metrics). Not the same as system.nodes.totalOnline from /system/stats, which often counts backends/inbounds and can exceed visible nodes.
admin_stats_panel_inner_nodes_hint: Traffic from bandwidth API; online users from node metrics, sorted by traffic
admin_stats_panel_nodes_empty: No per-node breakdown from the panel
admin_user_open_tg_profile_id_hint: The bot will send a profile button in Telegram.
admin_user_profile_link_message: User profile: {name} User ID: {user_id} Telegram ID: {telegram_id} Tap the button below to open the profile in Telegram.
user_hwid_limit_card_hint: Manual device limit for this user. Empty value returns to the tariff or default limit.
user_hwid_limit_input_hint: Empty means tariff/default; 0 or the checkbox means unlimited.
hwid_limit_invalid: Enter an integer device count from 0 to 1,000,000 or enable unlimited
user_tariff_card_hint: Change the user's tariff and sync panel squads immediately.
user_extend_tariff_required: Select a tariff before adding days
user_premium_override_card_hint: Unlimited access and extra volume for premium squads on top of the tariff.
user_regular_override_card_hint: Unlimited access and a persistent bonus on the main traffic limit.
user_traffic_override_hint: Extra main or premium traffic limits on top of the tariff; unlimited can be applied to main traffic or premium squads.
user_regular_override_bonus_hint: Persistent bonus bytes added to the main traffic limit (not a balance top-up).
regular_override_invalid_bonus: Invalid GB value for main traffic
user_premium_override_hint: Grant free unlimited access or extra premium traffic on top of the tariff limit.
user_premium_override_bonus_hint: Ignored while unlimited premium is enabled.
user_traffic_grant_hint: Credit GB to the user's balance — same effect as a top-up purchase, but without payment. The panel limit and squads refresh immediately.
traffic_grant_invalid_gb: Enter a positive number of GB
admin_user_extend_hwid_devices_hint: Active device top-ups will receive the same number of extra days.
admin_user_danger_zone_subtitle: These actions require confirmation and (for deletion) are irreversible
admin_user_ban_confirm_subtitle: {name} will no longer be able to interact with the bot. This can be undone later.
admin_user_delete_confirm_subtitle: This action is irreversible. Bot database records and the Remnawave Panel user will be deleted.
admin_tariff_label_hwid_count_full: How many devices does this package add
admin_ad_hint_param: Unique identifier for the referral link
admin_settings_hint: Changes in the admin panel take precedence over .env. The 'Reset' button returns the value from environment variables.
admin_settings_legacy_tariffs_warning_bo: These fields are only for the old mode without a JSON catalog. They do not apply when tariffs are configured in the dedicated Tariffs section.
admin_settings_group_platega_common_hint: Merchant details, API URL, and return pages shared by all Platega buttons.
admin_settings_group_platega_sbp_hint: Visibility, method ID, and labels for the card or SBP payment button.
admin_settings_group_platega_crypto_hint: Visibility, method ID, and labels for the crypto payment button.
admin_settings_group_platega_legacy_hint: Fallback method for old Platega callbacks and deployments.
admin_settings_group_legacy_tariff_perio: Monthly periods and prices for compatibility with old remnawave-tg-shop mode.
admin_settings_group_legacy_tariff_traff: Traffic packages for the old mode without a JSON tariff catalog.
admin_settings_field_log_admin_actions_d: When disabled, events from users listed in ADMIN_IDS are not stored in message logs.
admin_tariffs_catalog_empty: The catalog is empty. Add your first tariff; a catalog JSON file will be created after saving.
admin_tariffs_trial_subtitle: Configure trial duration, traffic limit, and Remnawave squads from the tariff page.
admin_tariffs_trial_squads_hint: These squads are applied when trial is activated. Empty value falls back to USER_SQUAD_UUIDS.
admin_tariffs_trial_group_switch_hint: Turns trial activation on or off for users.
admin_tariffs_trial_group_general_hint: Trial duration and traffic volume granted to the user.
admin_tariffs_trial_group_reset_hint: Strategy Remnawave uses to refresh the trial traffic limit.
admin_tariffs_trial_group_squads_hint: Squads assigned to the user when trial access is activated.
admin_tariffs_referral_subtitle: Configure welcome bonus, grant rules, and disposable email protection.
admin_tariffs_referral_group_welcome_hin: Days granted to an invited user after registration via referral link.
admin_tariffs_referral_group_rules_hint: Repeat-bonus limits and disposable email domains for no-Telegram accounts.
admin_tariffs_referral_disposable_domain: One domain per line or comma-separated. Subdomains are treated as matches too.
admin_tariffs_legacy_subtitle: Old remnawave-tg-shop periods and traffic packages used only when the JSON tariff catalog is not configured.
admin_themes_catalog_sub: Select the current theme from a card; edit appearance through files in the theme folder
admin_themes_catalog_empty: The catalog is empty. Add a theme folder to data/themes and refresh.
admin_settings_field_default_language_de: Controls the 'Default Language' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_default_currency_sy: Controls the 'Default Currency Symbol' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_support_link_descri: Controls the 'Support Link' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_required_channel_id: Controls the 'Required Channel ID' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_required_channel_li: Controls the 'Required Channel Link' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_panel_api_key_descr: Secret API key for the panel.
admin_settings_field_panel_api_total_tim: Maximum total time for one Remnawave API request, in seconds.
admin_settings_field_panel_api_connect_t: Maximum time to get or open a Remnawave API connection, in seconds.
admin_settings_field_panel_api_sock_conn: Maximum TCP/TLS connection time for Remnawave API, in seconds.
admin_settings_field_panel_api_sock_read: Maximum time to wait for response data from Remnawave API, in seconds.
admin_settings_field_panel_webhook_secre: Set the secret in Remnawave Panel and paste the same value here to verify incoming panel webhooks.
admin_settings_field_user_squad_uuids_de: Comma-separated UUIDs for the legacy mode without a JSON tariff catalog.
admin_settings_field_user_external_squad: Optional External Squad UUID for new users.
admin_settings_field_traffic_packages_de: Controls the 'Traffic Packages' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_payment_methods_ord: Controls the 'Payment Methods Order' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_subscription_purcha: Shows this text before the user chooses a purchase or renewal period.
admin_settings_field_payment_request_tim: Maximum total time for one payment provider API request, in seconds.
admin_settings_field_severpay_lifetime_m: Controls the 'SeverPay Lifetime Minutes' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_lava_secret_key_des: Signs outgoing API requests (HMAC-SHA256 in the Signature header).
admin_settings_field_lava_webhook_secret: The shop's additional key used to verify webhook signatures. Leave empty to reuse the secret key.
admin_settings_field_lava_lifetime_minut: 1..7200; leave empty for the LAVA default.
admin_settings_field_lava_include_servic: Comma-separated LAVA pay services shown on the payment page (e.g. card,sbp). Empty shows everything enabled for the shop.
admin_settings_field_cloudpayments_publi: Public ID from the CloudPayments dashboard (HTTP Basic auth username).
admin_settings_field_cloudpayments_api_s: API Secret from the CloudPayments dashboard. Used as the HTTP Basic auth password and to verify notification HMAC signatures.
admin_settings_field_cloudpayments_recur: Allow CloudPayments token charges for subscription auto-renew.
admin_settings_field_cloudpayments_verif: Verify the Content-HMAC header on Pay/Fail notifications.
admin_settings_field_cloudpayments_trust: Optional comma-separated IP addresses accepted for CloudPayments webhooks.
admin_settings_field_cryptopay_network_d: Controls the 'CryptoPay Network' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_cryptopay_currency_: Controls the 'CryptoPay Currency Type' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_wata_link_ttl_minut: 15..43200; default 15 minutes. Wata requires more than 10 minutes and allows up to 30 days.
admin_settings_field_wata_public_key_des: Optional. If empty, the backend fetches it from Wata.
admin_settings_field_wata_trusted_ips_de: Comma-separated IP addresses accepted for Wata webhooks.
admin_settings_field_heleket_currency_de: Fiat or crypto code (RUB, USD, USDT).
admin_settings_field_heleket_network_des: Optional blockchain network code (tron, bsc, eth).
admin_settings_field_heleket_trusted_ips: Comma-separated IP addresses accepted for Heleket webhooks.
admin_settings_field_trial_without_teleg: If disabled, email-only users must link Telegram before activating a trial. Disposable email domains always require Telegram.
admin_settings_field_referral_welcome_bo: If disabled, email-only users must link Telegram before receiving the referral welcome bonus. Disposable email domains always require Telegram.
admin_settings_field_disposable_email_do: Comma-separated domains. Users without Telegram using these emails cannot claim trial or referral welcome bonus.
admin_settings_field_subscription_email_: When enabled, subscription lifecycle notifications are mirrored to linked user email addresses.
admin_settings_field_log_level_descripti: Controls the 'Log Level' setting in admin overrides.
admin_settings_field_log_support_thread_: Log chat thread for support ticket notifications.
admin_settings_field_support_tickets_ena: Enable the support tickets section in the user account and allow users to create tickets.
admin_settings_field_support_admin_email: When disabled, new tickets and user replies are sent only to Telegram and the log chat.
admin_settings_field_support_admin_notif: Minimum seconds between repeated Telegram/log notifications for the same unread ticket.
admin_settings_field_support_admin_email: Minimum seconds between repeated email notifications for the same unread ticket.
admin_settings_field_support_ticket_max_: Maximum number of characters in a ticket message.
Maximum number of characters in a ticket subject.
admin_settings_field_support_ticket_rate: How many new tickets a user can create per hour. 0 means unlimited.
admin_settings_field_backup_enabled_desc: The worker periodically builds a ZIP archive and sends it to Telegram.
admin_settings_field_backup_chat_id_desc: Where ZIP archives are sent. Falls back to LOG_CHAT_ID when empty.
admin_settings_field_backup_thread_id_de: Optional topic/thread ID. Falls back to LOG_THREAD_ID when empty.
admin_settings_field_backup_interval_sec: Default is 3600: run on the hour boundary (12:00, 13:00, etc.).
admin_settings_field_backup_local_retent: How many latest ZIP archives to keep in data/backups on the server.
admin_settings_field_backup_compose_enab: Adds a /app/compose-source snapshot. If the folder is not mounted, the DB backup is still created.
wa_auth_password_login_failed: Could not sign in with this email and password. You can use an email code instead.
wa_password_modal_desc: Enter the new password twice. Then we will send a code to your linked email.
wa_password_modal_code_desc: Enter the email code to confirm the password.
wa_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
wa_password_too_long: Password must be at most 128 characters
wa_support_subtitle: Tickets and replies from the team
wa_support_message_placeholder: Tell us what happened. More details help us respond faster.
wa_support_empty_hint: Create a new request if you need help with billing, connection, or your account.
wa_support_open_ticket_hint: Open the ticket in Mini App.
wa_install_subscription_link_hint: Scan the QR code or copy the link.
wa_app_launch_opening_hint: Opening the app on this device...
wa_app_launch_hint: If the app did not open automatically, tap the button below.
wa_app_launch_done_hint: If the app opened, you can close this window.
wa_app_launch_unavailable_hint: Return to Telegram and try again.
admin_settings_field_subscription_guides: Open install instructions inside the Web App instead of an external connect page.
Use the Telegram Mini App install screen for bot connect buttons and show public install guide links.
admin_settings_field_subscription_page_c: Fetch Subscription Page config from Remnawave Panel by the user's subscription short UUID.
Use the JSON field below instead of Remnawave Panel config. Disabled by default.
Fallback path to a Remnawave Subscription Page v1 JSON config file.
Optional admin JSON override. It is applied only when the JSON override switch is enabled.
admin_section_translations_subtitle: Runtime localization string overrides from DB and data/locales-overrides.json
admin_translations_hint: Overrides are stored in DB and mirrored to {path}.
admin_translations_group_admin_hint: Navigation, tables, forms, dialogs, and admin-only labels.
admin_translations_group_admin_navigatio: Sidebar, section headers, toolbar actions, filters, and shared controls.
admin_translations_group_admin_dashboard: Dashboard cards, revenue charts, panel sync status, and monitoring copy.
admin_translations_group_admin_users_hin: User lists, user cards, bans, grants, premium overrides, and direct messages.
admin_translations_group_admin_payments_: Payment tables, payment details, exports, provider labels, and payment stats.
admin_translations_group_admin_promos_ma: Promo management, ad campaigns, marketing tools, and broadcast workflows.
admin_translations_group_admin_tariffs_h: Tariff catalog, tariff dialogs, legacy tariff rows, and trial tariff widgets.
admin_translations_group_admin_support_h: Support ticket inbox, ticket filters, admin replies, and support statuses.
admin_translations_group_admin_appearanc: Theme catalog, branding, logo, favicon, and public page links.
admin_translations_group_admin_settings_: Payment method toggles, prices, provider credentials, and webhook settings.
Panel connection, default squads, trials, referrals, device limits, and guides.
Logging, required channel, subscription notifications, and support limits.
Settings screen groups, subsections, helper text, and uncategorized settings.
admin_translations_group_admin_translati: Translation override screen, language controls, and locale group labels.
admin_translations_group_admin_logs_hint: Activity logs, log exports, CSV headers, and event detail labels.
admin_translations_group_admin_misc_hint: Older bot-admin labels and admin-only strings that do not fit another section.
admin_translations_group_webapp_hint: User-facing Mini App screens, navigation, settings, and toasts.
admin_translations_group_bot_menu_hint: Start menu, inline buttons, language selector, and bot-only flows.
admin_translations_group_subscriptions_h: Subscription status, install guides, traffic packages, trials, and devices.
admin_translations_group_payments_hint: Payment provider flows, invoices, payment methods, and checkout messages.
admin_translations_group_support_hint: Support links, ticket inbox copy, ticket statuses, and notifications.
admin_translations_group_referrals_promo: Referral program, invite copy, promo codes, and bonuses.
admin_translations_group_auth_security_h: Login, email verification, account linking, and security messages.
admin_translations_group_emails_hint: Transactional emails sent to users: login codes, payments, account merges, and reminders.
admin_translations_group_notifications_s: Admin notifications, panel sync, logs, and background status messages.
admin_translations_group_common_hint: Shared buttons, statuses, validation errors, and uncategorized strings.
admin_translations_file_write_warning: Translations saved in DB, but JSON file was not updated
admin_translations_languages_hint: Add override-only languages without adding base locale files.
admin_translations_audience_user_hint: Mini App, bot, payment, subscription, support, and auth copy.
admin_translations_audience_internal_hin: Admin panel, logs, sync statuses, and service notifications.
admin_appearance_brand_sub: Upload a logo as a file or from a URL
admin_appearance_custom_themes_empty: No custom themes yet. Add a separate theme to the catalog when you need more than the default theme.
admin_appearance_custom_themes_sub: Separate catalog themes: active theme selection, accent, logo scale, and admin usage.
admin_appearance_default_theme_section_s: The app baseline theme: dark and light modes, colors, fonts, and logo scale.
admin_appearance_themes_sub: Global theme, accent color, and preview
admin_section_appearance_subtitle: Logo, themes, and Mini App accent colors
admin_tariff_create_subtitle: The catalog will be saved to JSON after confirmation
admin_tariff_delete_subtitle: Tariff {key} will disappear from the sales catalog.
admin_tariff_enabled_hint: A disabled tariff is hidden from the bot/Mini App, but active subscriptions on it keep working
admin_tariff_error_delete_last_enabled: Cannot delete the last enabled tariff
admin_tariff_error_key_exists: A tariff with this key already exists
admin_tariff_error_min_enabled: At least one tariff must be enabled
admin_tariff_hint_conversion: This rate converts the remaining subscription period to gigabytes when a user switches from Period to Traffic
admin_tariff_hint_hwid: How many devices can use the subscription at the same time. Empty means use the .env value; 0 means unlimited
admin_tariff_hint_key: Latin characters, no spaces. Used in payments and subscriptions; changing it after publication is not recommended
admin_tariff_hint_premium_name_ru: This text replaces "Premium servers" in the account, top-ups, and limit cards.
admin_tariff_hint_premium_squads: Remnawave squads available only to owners of this tariff. Traffic is counted by their accessible nodes
admin_tariff_hint_premium_traffic_limit: How many GB through premium squads are included each month. 0 or empty means there is no separate premium limit
admin_tariff_hint_squads: Remnawave squads this tariff connects the user to. Select one or more
admin_tariff_hint_traffic_limit: How many GB are included every month. 0 means unlimited traffic. Extra packages can be sold on the Top-ups tab
admin_tariff_hwid_packages_subtitle: Extends the limit from the General tab. Each row is a "+N devices for N currency units" package
admin_tariff_model_period_desc: the user buys a fixed period (1/3/12 months, etc.)
admin_tariff_model_traffic_desc: the user buys gigabyte packages at a fixed price per GB
admin_tariff_premium_head: Premium access and a separate traffic counter
admin_tariff_premium_subhead: Premium squads give the user access to faster/premium nodes; their traffic is counted separately from main traffic so it can be limited or sold separately
admin_tariff_premium_topup_subtitle: Packages that extend the monthly premium limit when the user runs out
admin_tariff_pricing_empty: Add at least one period so the tariff appears in the storefront.
admin_tariff_pricing_period_subtitle: Each row is a separate storefront option: how many months the user pays for and how much it costs. Drag rows by the handle to set the period order in the bot and the web app
admin_tariff_pricing_traffic_subtitle: Base storefront for the traffic model. Each row is an "N gigabytes for N currency units" package. Drag rows by the handle to set the package order in the bot and the web app
admin_tariff_topup_subtitle: When a user runs out of the monthly limit, they can buy an extra package without changing the subscription term
admin_tariff_topup_title: Traffic top-up over the monthly limit
admin_tariff_topup_traffic_hint: For the traffic model, separate top-ups are not needed: packages configured on the Prices tab are the top-ups users can buy again as they run out.
admin_tariff_visible: Tariff is visible in the storefront
admin_tariffs_catalog_subtitle: Periods, prices, traffic, and user access.
admin_tariffs_currency_subtitle: Tariff prices and payment providers are checked against this currency.
admin_tariffs_provider_empty: Provider data has not been loaded yet.
admin_tariffs_provider_subtitle: Shows which providers can accept the current catalog currency.
admin_user_premium_override_card_hint: Unlimited access and extra volume for premium squads on top of the tariff.
admin_user_tariff_card_hint: Change the user's tariff and sync panel squads immediately.
admin_user_extend_tariff_required: Select a tariff before adding days
admin_user_regular_override_card_hint: Unlimited access and a permanent bonus to the main traffic limit.
admin_user_regular_override_status_none: Main traffic bonus is not set
admin_user_traffic_grant_hint: Adds GB to the user balance like a top-up, but without payment. The limit and squads update in the panel immediately.
admin_settings_field_telemetry_enabled_d: Stores local installation heartbeats and anonymous browser risk signals. Nothing is sent externally.
admin_settings_field_telemetry_retention: Anonymous data is deleted after this many hours without a match (1-720).
admin_settings_field_telemetry_fingerpri: Reject welcome rewards when similarity reaches this score (1-100).
admin_settings_field_telegram_login_clie: Client ID from BotFather Web Login for browser registration and sign-in.
admin_settings_field_stars_enabled_descr: Accept digital-goods payments through Telegram Stars.
wa_bandwidth_usage_chart_aria: Bandwidth usage bar chart for the last 7 days
wa_panel_name_description: Custom name displayed in the header and browser tab.
wa_trial_risk_rejected: Trial activation was rejected due to security checks.
pb_pay_for_what_you_need: Pay only for what you need
pb_remaining_recalc: Remaining 12 days will be recalculated under the new tariff.
pb_friend_gets_days: Friend gets +3 days to their subscription.
wa_notify_expiry_desc: Notify via Telegram / Email before subscription expires
wa_notify_traffic_desc: Notify via Telegram / Email when traffic usage reaches threshold
